theme_and_archetype.reasoning: Needs to feel world-class, trusted, and expensive. Avoiding generic SaaS purple/blue tech in favor of deep cinematic darkness with warm, human (copper/amber) highlights.

typography.pairing_strategy: Unexpected highly structured editorial sans paired with an ancient-feeling serif and technical mono.

scales.overline: text-xs md:text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-mono text-accent_secondary

motion_and_interactions.scroll_reveal: opacity-0 translate-y-8 animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-bottom-8 duration-700

signature_elements.the_aura: A slow-moving, blurred orb of color (accent_primary) that follows the user's scroll progression behind the main content, acting as a dynamic gradient backdrop.
signature_elements.the_scanner: During the 30s loading state, an ethereal, glowing copper line that vertically scans the uploaded palm image, leaving a trail of decoded AI data (in JetBrains Mono) that fades out slowly.
signature_elements.grid_exposure: Using the 'Grid Borders (Technical Look)' for the pricing and feature showcase, exposing the skeleton of the UI to imply precision and data density.

section_guidelines.nav: Sticky header with 'Crystal Glass' effect (backdrop-blur-2xl, bg-black/40). Navigation links hidden on mobile behind a sleek menu. Logo left, login/CTA right.
section_guidelines.hero: Massive 'Clash Display' typography centered. Background features the ethereal smoke image with low opacity (30%). A primary CTA button that glows subtly. An 'Overline' above the H1 in Mono font indicating 'VERSION 5.2 | VISION AI'.
section_guidelines.social_proof: The 'Editorial Ribbon' Marquee. Very slow, pale background or subtle border-y, featuring logos and text in JetBrains Mono or Cormorant Garamond italic.
section_guidelines.upload_scanner: The core interactive element. A bento-style large container (col-span-8) with a dashed border that glows on drag-over. Once uploaded, triggers the 'Scanner' signature element with a 30s premium loading state.
section_guidelines.paywall_preview: A highly blurred (backdrop-blur-3xl) overlay covering the 'Report' grid. Above the blur, a crisp, clean 'Grid Borders' pricing/unlock card. The user can see shapes and colors of their palm analysis behind the glass, building curiosity.
section_guidelines.features_bento: Tetris Grid bento layout. Dark surfaces, subtle 1px inner borders. Using JetBrains Mono for feature tags.
section_guidelines.testimonials: Minimalist portrait silhouettes inside tall bento cards. Quote in Cormorant Garamond italic to give it a human, profound, emotional weight.
section_guidelines.pricing: No standard cards. A 3-column technical grid (border-collapse style). The 'Plus ₹399/mo' tier highlighted with a subtle 'Tracing Beam' border effect.
section_guidelines.footer: Massive typography (text-[8vw]) for the brand name. Darkest background. Simple, elegant links.

image_urls.description: Left human palm close-up photography in cinematic lighting. Use with heavy dark overlay (bg-black/60) for the hero or upload section background.
Abstract swirls of dark smoke with glowing red/amber embers. Use as a masked background texture behind the bento grid or paywall.
Minimalist silhouette portrait for high-end testimonial.
Silhouette of man for premium testimonial.

components_to_use: Shadcn Tabs (for switching between Report sections in Dashboard)
Framer Motion (for 'The Scanner' line and scroll reveals)
instructions_to_main_agent: Implement this design system with absolute precision. Use Clash Display for all primary headings, Cormorant Garamond specifically for elegant italicized quotes or sub-accents, and JetBrains Mono for AI data metrics. The background must be #050505, not a generic slate. Ensure the Paywall is built as a blurred overlay (backdrop-blur-3xl) sitting on top of the actual dashboard report components to build trust and curiosity. Integrate the 'Scanning Line' animation using Framer Motion during the 30s upload state. Do not use generic Shadcn Cards; instead, build custom Bento Grid cells with 1px border-white/10 and bg-white/[0.02]. All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.
